diagrams.title: Three Pillars of Sustainability
diagrams.description: The Triple Bottom Line showing Environmental, Social, and Economic pillars that form the foundation of sustainable development in Green IT
elements: Green IT at center connecting all three
diagrams.purpose: Understand that Green IT requires balancing all three dimensions for true sustainability

diagrams.title: PUE Calculation Formula
diagrams.description: Visual representation of Power Usage Effectiveness calculation showing total facility energy divided by IT equipment energy
elements: Total Facility Energy (cooling + lighting + power + IT)
diagrams.purpose: Learn to calculate and interpret PUE as a key Green IT metric

diagrams.title: E-waste Management Hierarchy
diagrams.description: Pyramid showing preferred methods for handling electronic waste from most to least preferred
diagrams.purpose: Remember the priority order for sustainable e-waste handling

diagrams.title: Server Virtualization Concept
diagrams.description: Diagram showing multiple virtual servers running on a single physical server versus traditional one-to-one setup
diagrams.purpose: Visualize how virtualization reduces physical hardware and energy consumption

diagrams.title: Life Cycle Assessment Stages
diagrams.description: Linear diagram showing all stages of product lifecycle from cradle to grave
elements: Arrows showing continuous loop for recycling
diagrams.purpose: Understand full environmental impact of IT products throughout their existence
